entity.summary: Cardano decentralized exchange supporting permissionless token swaps, liquidity pools, farming, staking, launch services, governance, analytics, and aggregator interfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation and the live site identify Minswap as an active Cardano DEX. The protocol supports permissionless token trading, liquidity provision, farming, staking, launch services, governance, analytics, and aggregator functions. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Minswap introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Minswap as a decentralized exchange enabling permissionless token-pair trading and liquidity provision on Cardano.

evidence.title: Minswap live trading interface
evidence.notes: Current first-party site exposes live trade, swap, aggregator, liquidity, staking, farming, launch, governance, analytics, and wallet-connection functions and reports current protocol activity.
